channel.name: LuxuryDogs World
channel.niche: rare dogs, expensive dog breeds, luxury pets, cute dogs, unusual dog breeds worldwide
channel.target_audience: Dog lovers 25-60 fascinated by luxury, rare breeds, and exotic pets — US + UK + AU
channel.tone: aspirational, elegant, warm — like a luxury travel host but for dogs

content_rules: Always include the price range for the breed (purchase price + annual cost)
Include the country of origin and historical background for each breed
Describe temperament, size, and care requirements concisely
Highlight what makes each breed rare or exclusive (limited breeding, royal history, etc.)
Include a 'fun fact' at the end of each breed segment to boost engagement
Format: '10 Rarest/Most Expensive Dogs in the World' style listicles perform best
